title: 1.1: Adds `IsNullish` import from `go.k6.io/k6/js/common` in all 7 files where `IsNullish` is called (including `browser_context_mapping.go`, `helpers.go`, `element_handle_options.go`, `frame_options.go`, `layout.go`, `mouse_options.go`, `page_options.go`)
1.2: Replaces `sobekValueExists` with `IsNullish` in all 4 functions (including `mergeWith`, `exportTo`, `exportArg`, `sobekEmptyString`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/browser/helpers.go`

1.3: Replaces null/undefined patterns with `IsNullish` in all 13 functions (including `ElementHandleBaseOptions.Parse`, `ElementHandleBasePointerOptions.Parse`, `ElementHandleClickOptions.Parse`, ...) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/common/element_handle_options.go`

1.4: Replaces null/undefined patterns with `IsNullish` in all 10 functions (including `FrameBaseOptions.Parse`, `FrameGotoOptions.Parse`, `FrameWaitForFunctionOptions.Parse`, ...) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/common/frame_options.go`

1.5: Replaces `sobekValueExists` with `IsNullish` in all 4 functions (including `parseContinueOptions`, `parseFulfillOptions`, `parseHeaders`, `parseWaitForResponseOptions`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/browser/route_mapping.go`
1.6: Replaces `sobekValueExists` with `IsNullish` in both functions (`addInitScript`, `parseWaitForEventOptions`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/browser/browser_context_mapping.go`

1.7: Replaces inline null/undefined patterns with `IsNullish` in all 4 functions (including `MouseClickOptions.Parse`, `MouseDblClickOptions.Parse`, `MouseDownUpOptions.Parse`, `MouseMoveOptions.Parse`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/common/mouse_options.go`
1.8: Replaces `sobekValueExists` with `IsNullish` in both functions (`parseGetByRoleOptions`, `parseGetByBaseOptions`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/browser/page_mapping.go`
1.9: Replaces inline null/undefined pattern with `IsNullish` in `Size.Parse` function in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/common/layout.go`

1.10: Replaces null/undefined patterns with `IsNullish` in all 3 functions (including `PageEmulateMediaOptions.Parse`, `PageReloadOptions.Parse`, `PageScreenshotOptions.Parse`) in `internal/js/modules/k6/browser/common/page_options.go`
4.1: Removes null/undefined verification checks without replacing them with equivalent functionality
4.2: Modifies files outside the browser module scope, such as the `js/common` package implementation
